description: CompositionBlue jeans made of 100% cotton with a washed and distressed look, has two inserted pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with distressing, embroidery and stitch detailing, brand patch printed on the waistband and a metal zipper and button closureFitLow rise Slim FitWash careWash separately as colour may bleedDo not iron in order to retain creased lookGuaranteed to make you feel wonderful, this pair of washed and distressed jeans from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. The slim fit and denim effects give you that stylish edge, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with a t-shirt and canvas shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32& rdquo
